title: [firtool] Add --parse-only option
body: Add a `--parse-only` option to `firtool` which causes the program to stop after the FIR/MLIR and annotation input files have been parsed and processed, and writes the resulting MLIR module to the output. This is interesting and useful since `firtool` performs a unique combination of input translation and annotation scattering that is not trivially reproduced with `circt-translate` and `circt-opt`. Useful for test case reduction.
